active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
residual_risks: Crash-window idempotence still depends on persisted tool_executed trace after archival memory/message side effects.
Role tool message is visible in v3 recent context as compact text; full metadata remains durable on the message record but is not rendered into ContextLayerItem metadata.
Public benchmark kernel path is still a synthetic control-plane probe, not a full answer-generating agent loop.
Downstream consumers expecting kernel_trace_events as strings may need migration to structured event dictionaries.
